summary: Change screw hardware from M3 to M5 (clearance, countersink, and heat-set insert dimensions); update header comments accordingly.

scad_changes.description: Update top-of-file header to reference M5 screws
scad_changes.search: //  OpenSCAD  |  12 pieces  |  no backing plate  |  16 × M3 × 12 mm
scad_changes.replace: //  OpenSCAD  |  12 pieces  |  no backing plate  |  16 × M5 × 12 mm

scad_changes.description: Update SCREW FIT block header from M3 to M5
Update PIECE_H comment reference from M3 to M5
scad_changes.search: PIECE_H   = 12;     // mm — total piece thickness (= M3×12 screw length)
scad_changes.replace: PIECE_H   = 12;     // mm — total piece thickness (= M5×12 screw length)

scad_changes.description: Update hardware constants block: shaft Ø, head Ø, countersink depth, insert Ø for M5
scad_changes.search:
SCREW_D      =  3.2;  // M3 shaft clearance Ø (mm)
CS_D         =  6.0;  // M3 DIN 7991 countersunk head Ø (mm)
CS_DEPTH     =  2.5;  // countersink cone depth from top face (mm)
INSERT_D     =  4.6;  // heat-set insert outer Ø (mm)
INSERT_DEPTH =  4.0;  // insert pocket depth = TAB_H (fills full tab zone)
scad_changes.replace:
SCREW_D      =  5.3;  // M5 shaft clearance Ø (mm)
CS_D         = 10.0;  // M5 DIN 7991 countersunk head Ø (mm)
CS_DEPTH     =  3.0;  // countersink cone depth from top face (mm)
INSERT_D     =  6.4;  // M5 heat-set insert outer Ø (mm)
INSERT_DEPTH =  4.0;  // insert pocket depth = TAB_H (fills full tab zone)
